message:
test(mux-client): add concurrent connect test verifying unique connection ID assignment

Add integration test that spawns 4 concurrent DirectMuxClient::connect() calls
against a mock server and asserts each receives a unique positive connection_id.
This validates the atomic connection ID counter under concurrent access, ensuring
no two clients share the same ID even when connecting simultaneously.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
